short_name: Strict coordinatewise monotone transforms preserve product order
novelty_status: CLASSICAL; ATTRIBUTE, DO NOT CLAIM NUMERICAL VALIDATION AS EVIDENCE
allowed_claim: Order-only data are invariant under monotone recalibration of latent marginals.
forbidden_overclaim: A new theorem established by 270 simulations.
editorial_note: One proof paragraph; simulations are regression checks only.

short_name: The induced order law depends on the copula, not continuous marginals
allowed_claim: Order observations cannot identify latent marginal scales within a fixed copula class.
forbidden_overclaim: A new copula theorem or recovery of spacetime measure from order alone.
editorial_note: Attribute directly to copula invariance/Sklar.

short_name: No deterministic order-only estimator can distinguish monotone-equivalent latent models
allowed_claim: Additional non-order information is necessary to identify latent marginal quantities.
forbidden_overclaim: That every physically relevant measure is forever unrecoverable from any enriched relational model.
editorial_note: Use as the first obstruction motivating extra primitives.

short_name: An independent q field can evade the order-only identifiability limit
allowed_claim: q can supply relative quantitative information absent from order.
forbidden_overclaim: That the physical origin or empirical meaning of q has been derived.
editorial_note: State q as an added primitive, not an emergent physical field.

short_name: Global q offset is unobservable under contrast-only constructions
allowed_claim: The current construction determines q only up to a global offset.
forbidden_overclaim: A deep independent no-go, or proof that nature has this gauge.
editorial_note: Define the gauge contract before using q operationally.

short_name: Exponential transition log-odds encode q contrasts
novelty_status: CLASSICAL MULTINOMIAL-LOGIT IDENTITY APPLIED TO q
allowed_claim: The exponential kernel makes q contrasts operational in transition odds.
forbidden_overclaim: That the kernel or beta follows from the RZS primitives.
editorial_note: Call the exponential kernel a candidate operational model.

short_name: Raw q scale and exponential strength are jointly degenerate
allowed_claim: Only the product of raw-score scale and coupling strength is identifiable without calibration.
forbidden_overclaim: That lambda is always pure gauge after any normalization.
editorial_note: Distinguish raw q-scale degeneracy from standardized lambda identifiability.

short_name: Scale-free standardized q scores admit infinitely many local kernels
allowed_claim: The audited symmetry and locality principles leave the kernel law underdetermined.
forbidden_overclaim: That no additional axiom can select a law.
editorial_note: Show why locality and symmetry alone leave infinitely many kernels.

short_name: Difference-based odds and IIA select an exponential score family
allowed_claim: These axioms narrow the family to exponentials but do not fix lambda.
forbidden_overclaim: A wholly new derivation of multinomial logit or proof that nature obeys IIA.
editorial_note: Classical Luce/functional-equation result; no novelty claim.

short_name: After local standardization, lambda is an identifiable dimensionless model parameter but remains underived
allowed_claim: lambda is not removable after standardization and must be estimated or derived separately.
forbidden_overclaim: A fundamental constant or a value predicted by the current theory.
editorial_note: lambda remains estimated or externally derived, never predicted here.

short_name: No nontrivial continuous cardinal score satisfies both extension stability and full positive-affine invariance
novelty_status: ELEMENTARY COROLLARY OF STANDARD INTERVAL-SCALE MEASUREMENT INVARIANCE; PROJECT-SPECIFIC CONTEXT FORMULATION
allowed_claim: The project formalizes a short incompatibility among extension stability, numerical positive-affine invariance, continuity, and nontrivial cardinal score differences.
forbidden_overclaim: A fundamentally new measurement-theory impossibility theorem, or a claim that interval-scale differences are meaningless.
editorial_note: Foundational lemma, not a headline theorem.

short_name: Additive base measure restores exact clone/refinement invariance for weighted messages
allowed_claim: Base-measure weighting removes naive clone-count dependence.
forbidden_overclaim: That the origin or physical semantics of mu are derived.
editorial_note: Positive identity survives despite A29.1's boundary failure.

short_name: Relation plus q cannot distinguish descriptive clones from ontically distinct copies
novelty_status: POTENTIALLY ORIGINAL FRAMEWORK FORMULATION; BASIC LOGIC IS GENERAL
allowed_claim: An additional refinement/multiplicity semantics is required to distinguish the two interpretations.
forbidden_overclaim: Proof that copies can never be physically distinguished by any enriched future theory.
editorial_note: Motivate mu through representational insufficiency, not ontology rhetoric.

short_name: Positive leaf weights have a unique additive extension on a finite refinement tree
novelty_status: CLASSICAL FINITE ADDITIVITY RESULT; PROJECT APPLICATION
allowed_claim: Once leaf weights are supplied, additive mass is path-independent and uniquely determined.
forbidden_overclaim: That terminal leaves or their weights are physically selected.
editorial_note: Finite additive extension is classical; use as construction.

short_name: Consistent finite-branching refinements define a projective measure without terminal leaves
allowed_claim: Terminal ontology is not mathematically required for a projective measure.
forbidden_overclaim: A new extension theorem or proof that physical reality is infinitely divisible.
editorial_note: Use extension theorem to remove terminal-leaf dependence.

short_name: Atomicity and terminality are logically distinct
novelty_status: CLEAN FRAMEWORK-SPECIFIC ILLUSTRATION OF CLASSICAL DISTINCTION
allowed_claim: Terminal nodes and measure atoms must not be identified.
forbidden_overclaim: A classification of all refinement measures.
editorial_note: Atomicity and terminality must remain distinct.

short_name: Exact regrouping consistency gives conditional ratios of additive weights
allowed_claim: Projective regrouping selects the ratio architecture once W is given.
forbidden_overclaim: That projectivity selects the terminal weights or their physical origin.
editorial_note: Ratio law is conditional probability architecture once W is given.

short_name: W_lambda(B)=sum mu_l exp(-lambda q_l) is exactly projective and gauge covariant
novelty_status: CLASSICAL LOG-SUM-EXP / PARTITION-FUNCTION ALGEBRA APPLIED TO FRAMEWORK
allowed_claim: This weight is an exact static projective message for the chosen exponential law.
forbidden_overclaim: Thermodynamic energy, physical temperature, or a derived fundamental law.
editorial_note: Bridge from additive measure to exponential static message.

short_name: Projectivity does not determine terminal weights or their ontology
allowed_claim: Consistency constrains how weights combine, not which weights nature uses.
forbidden_overclaim: That no physical or statistical principle could determine weights.
editorial_note: Consistency does not select the terminal weights.

short_name: Q_lambda is statically associative
allowed_claim: Q_lambda is an exact static sufficient score for the corresponding partition sum.
forbidden_overclaim: A unique coarse-graining variable for every observable or a thermodynamic state variable.
editorial_note: Static associativity is classical log-sum-exp structure.

short_name: Q_lambda(aq+c)=c+a Q_{a lambda}(q)
novelty_status: CLASSICAL ALGEBRAIC PROPERTY OF THE EXPONENTIAL CERTAINTY EQUIVALENT / ENTROPIC RISK FUNCTIONAL
allowed_claim: The framework uses the standard affine covariance Q_lambda(aq+c)=c+a Q_{a lambda}(q) to track score-scale and parameter coupling.
forbidden_overclaim: A newly discovered log-partition transformation law or evidence for physical renormalization.
editorial_note: Background affine identity with attribution.

short_name: Q'_lambda=(1-a) q_bar + a Q_{a lambda}
novelty_status: PROJECT-SPECIFIC DIRECT COROLLARY OF CLASSICAL AFFINE COVARIANCE; EXACT BUT NOT AN INDEPENDENT NEW THEOREM
allowed_claim: For the declared centered contraction, the exact transport law Q'_lambda=(1-a)q_bar+aQ_{a lambda} follows and exposes parameter transport.
forbidden_overclaim: A previously unknown algebraic identity, a physical evolution law, or a renormalization-group flow.
editorial_note: Central exact transport proposition; algebra classical, use project-specific.

short_name: A single Q_lambda is not generally a dynamically closed state variable
novelty_status: PROJECT-SPECIFIC EXACT NONCLOSURE COROLLARY WITH AN EXACT FOUR-POINT COUNTEREXAMPLE; NO EXACT PRIOR MATCH FOUND; NOVELTY NOT CERTIFIED
allowed_claim: On the unrestricted finite-distribution class, mean plus one fixed-lambda entropic score does not determine the next score; an exact four-point witness is provided.
forbidden_overclaim: No finite-dimensional closure can exist, the whole curve is always minimal, or the result solves the general moment-closure problem.
editorial_note: Use the exact four-point witness in the proof body.

short_name: Q_lambda depends on the cumulant hierarchy
allowed_claim: Higher cumulants explain the generic failure of mean-variance closure.
forbidden_overclaim: A globally convergent expansion for heavy-tailed laws.
editorial_note: Keep cumulants as explanation, not a separate novelty claim.

short_name: Translation-covariant decomposable quasi-arithmetic means reduce to arithmetic or exponential families
allowed_claim: The audited regular mean class contains two translation-covariant families relevant to the framework.
forbidden_overclaim: A new classification theorem or uniqueness of a physical coarse-graining.
editorial_note: Classical quasi-arithmetic characterization.

short_name: Q_lambda exactly preserves the exponential kernel under grouping
allowed_claim: Q_lambda is the exact static message for this declared observable.
forbidden_overclaim: The unique coarse variable for every law or a physical thermodynamic potential.
editorial_note: Exact sufficiency for the declared exponential kernel.

short_name: A micro kernel and partition do not determine a unique macro transition without source occupancy
allowed_claim: Occupancy or a lumpability condition is necessary for a unique macro Markov kernel.
forbidden_overclaim: A new discovery of lumpability or proof that pi is a fundamental physical field.
editorial_note: Attribute to Markov aggregation/lumpability.

short_name: Joint flows aggregate exactly when occupancy is supplied
allowed_claim: Carrying joint flow or occupancy restores exact dynamic aggregation.
forbidden_overclaim: That the physical origin, dynamics, or uniqueness of pi is known.
editorial_note: Show flow as exact positive construction.

short_name: There is no observable-independent unique scalar coarse-graining of q
mathematical_status: SUPPORTED BY EXACT IDENTITIES AND COUNTEREXAMPLES
allowed_claim: A coarse-graining rule must be specified relative to the observable or dynamics it is meant to preserve.
forbidden_overclaim: A universal proof that no richer common state representation exists.
editorial_note: State observable-relative coarse-graining as the organizing principle.

short_name: Current minimal architecture is (R,q,mu,K,pi)
mathematical_status: CONCEPTUAL ARCHITECTURE; NOT A UNIQUENESS THEOREM
allowed_claim: The framework gives a disciplined provisional inventory of information needed for order, measure, transition, and coarse-grained flow.
forbidden_overclaim: A proven unique ontology, a final fundamental theory, or derivation of all primitives.
editorial_note: Use 'provisional informational architecture', not uniquely minimal ontology.

short_name: The obstruction map is a framework-level contribution
mathematical_status: SUPPORTED BY MIXED CLASSICAL AND PROJECT-SPECIFIC RESULTS
novelty_status: ORIGINAL ORGANIZATION; INDIVIDUAL ITEMS HAVE UNEQUAL NOVELTY
allowed_claim: The catalogue clarifies which additional structures are logically needed in the current programme.
forbidden_overclaim: Presenting every no-go as equally deep or technically novel.
editorial_note: Separate classical ingredients from project synthesis typographically.

short_name: No physical spacetime, calibrated metric, gravity, or experimental mapping has been derived
allowed_claim: The work is a formal pre-categorical research programme with explicit open physical bridges.
forbidden_overclaim: Confirmed fundamental physics, emergent GR, matter, energy, or experimental support.
editorial_note: Mandatory final boundary: no physical spacetime or empirical map derived.

short_name: Equivariant endogenous dynamics preserve observational equivalence
novelty_status: LIKELY STANDARD GROUP-EQUIVARIANCE PRINCIPLE; PROJECT APPLICATION
allowed_claim: Purely endogenous equivariant evolution cannot break the targeted order-preserving symmetry.
forbidden_overclaim: That dynamics can never break symmetry when stochastic laws, boundary conditions, or new primitives are non-equivariant.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: A calibrated non-invariant mark can break order degeneracy
allowed_claim: Additional calibrated structure can break the degeneracy.
forbidden_overclaim: That the required calibration has been physically derived.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: Weighted standardization is singular at zero variance and not uniformly stable near vanishing mass
allowed_claim: The proposed standardized message needs an explicit nondegeneracy domain or a different boundary treatment.
forbidden_overclaim: That all weighted coarse-graining is unstable.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: Gaussian affine dynamics close exactly in mean and variance
allowed_claim: Mean-variance closure is exact inside the Gaussian invariant family.
forbidden_overclaim: That centering, finite variance, or the present RZS law derives Gaussianity.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: Finite variance does not guarantee finite Q_lambda
allowed_claim: The partition-score formalism requires stronger tail control than finite variance.
forbidden_overclaim: That every heavy-tailed alternative is inadmissible for every observable.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: Mass plus weighted median is not a closed hierarchical message
allowed_claim: Median is robust but that scalar summary is not hierarchically closed.
forbidden_overclaim: No hierarchical quantile sketch or richer summary can exist.
editorial_note: Do not expand into a second paper inside the main text.

short_name: Centering does not Gaussianize innovations or eliminate higher cumulants
allowed_claim: Centered noise is not equivalent to Gaussian noise.
forbidden_overclaim: A universal statement about every interacting RZS graph process.
editorial_note: Reserve for a future noise/universality paper unless a reviewer requests it.

short_name: Gaussianity is selected only by additional strong assumption packages
allowed_claim: The framework can list sufficient Gaussian-selection principles and identify which are currently absent.
forbidden_overclaim: That the present RZS dynamics derives Gaussian noise.
editorial_note: Reserve for a future noise/universality paper unless a reviewer requests it.

short_name: Central-limit convergence is asymptotic and requires independence or mixing plus tail conditions
allowed_claim: Gaussian universality is a conditional asymptotic regime, not an automatic consequence of centering.
forbidden_overclaim: Exact finite-scale Gaussianity or convergence of all nonlinear observables.
editorial_note: Reserve for a future noise/universality paper unless a reviewer requests it.

short_name: Matched mean and variance universalize low-order linear observables but not nonlinear/tail observables
novelty_status: PROJECT-SPECIFIC SYNTHESIS OF CLASSICAL LINEAR-PROCESS FACTS
allowed_claim: Noise details can be dispensable for some observables and essential for others.
forbidden_overclaim: Universality of the full RZS graph dynamics.
editorial_note: Reserve for a future noise/universality paper unless a reviewer requests it.

short_name: Shared non-Gaussian factors can block Gaussian coarse-graining
allowed_claim: Independence or adequate mixing is a substantive requirement for Gaussian universality.
forbidden_overclaim: That all correlated systems fail to Gaussianize.
editorial_note: Reserve for a future noise/universality paper unless a reviewer requests it.
